name: md-docx-converter
description: Bidirectional Markdown ↔ Word (.docx) conversion via MCP. Read, write, and convert between .md and .docx files with full heading hierarchy, table, image, and inline formatting support.

tools.name: read_docx
tools.description: Read a Word (.docx) document and return its full content as Markdown text.

tools.name: write_docx
tools.description: Convert Markdown text to a Word (.docx) document and save it to disk.

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Absolute path where the .docx should be saved

tools.name: convert_md_file_to_docx
tools.description: Convert a Markdown (.md) file to a Word (.docx) file saved alongside the input.

tools.name: convert_docx_file_to_md
tools.description: Convert a Word (.docx) file to a Markdown (.md) file saved alongside the input.
